name: Siam Steel Service Center Public Company Limited
summary: Siam Steel Service Center Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells steel accessories in Thailand. The company offers cutting sheets and slitting coils for automotive, electrical appliances and electronics, furniture, and other related industries; and coated corrugated sheets for construction industries. It also provides metal roofing and wall panel installation, and steel cutting services; and special production and services. Siam Steel Service Center Public Company Limited was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Samut Prakan, Thailand.
